message:
feat(storage): per-pane indexing progress tracking + health surfaces

Add observability for FTS indexing state per pane:

- PaneIndexingStats struct: segment_count, total_bytes, max_seq,
  last_segment_at, fts_row_count, fts_consistent
- IndexingHealthReport struct: aggregate stats + per-pane breakdown
  with overall healthy flag
- get_pane_indexing_stats_sync(): per-pane segment stats query
  (only observed panes)
- check_fts_integrity_sync(): FTS5 integrity-check command
- build_indexing_health_report(): aggregate with FTS corruption
  propagation to all panes
- StorageHandle::get_pane_indexing_stats() async method
- StorageHandle::get_indexing_health() async method
- 11 new tests covering: empty DB, no segments, segment tracking,
  multi-pane, seq monotonicity, ignored pane exclusion, health
  report aggregation, FTS integrity check, report builder healthy/
  unhealthy paths

All 1047 wa-core tests pass.

Closes wa-upg.5.2

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
